title: `Eyn #5887
definition:
En-tappuah = "fountain of the apple-city"

 1) a place on the border between Ephraim and Manasseh
nasbUsage:
Definition: En-tappuah = "fountain of the apple-city"

 1) a place on the border between Ephraim and Manasseh

    NASB:  place of an apple tree, a city in Ephraim
